_description: Agent Memory Schema v1 — Structured immutable decision log for multi-agent pre-feasibility assessment. One memory record per agent execution.
_rules: Memory is written ONCE per agent per session and NEVER modified
Downstream agents READ upstream memories but CANNOT write to them
PM Agent (Agent 4) MAY annotate but NOT edit Agent 1-3 memories
All memories become IMMUTABLE upon session closure
Every decision MUST cite at least one evidence source
agent_name: <<Agent 1 — Knowledge Retrieval | Agent 2 — Technical Assessment | Agent 3 — Risk & Economic Assessment | Agent 4 — PM Review>>

assumptions.description: <<Steel offtake mapped to industrial process group for project matching>>
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: <<HIGH — steel-specific projects may be ranked lower than justified if mapping is incorrect>>

decisions.statement: <<Top similar project: Normand'Hy (GA-PR-001) with similarity score 0.81>>
decisions.rationale: <<Same country (France), same technology (PEM), closest scale above query (200 MW). Refinery offtake in industrial process group with steel.>>

confidence.basis: <<Weighted average of source quality (0.60) adjusted for consistency (×1.0). 6 of 7 sources are Level A or B.>>
confidence.limiting_factor: <<No steel-offtake project in Gold Dataset — industry match is via cross-reference, not direct>>

warnings.description: <<No steel-offtake project in Gold Dataset. All industry matches are cross-referenced from refinery/ammonia.>>
warnings.mitigation: <<Flag for Gold Dataset Sprint 2: add steel-offtake project>>

contradictions_detected.description: <<Agent 2 says 'not FOAK for scale' (100 MW within 200 MW proven). Agent 3 applies FOAK cost premium.>>
contradictions_detected.classification_rationale: <<TRADE-OFF — not a contradiction. Agent 2 assessed SCALE (within range). Agent 3 assessed APPLICATION (steel offtake is novel). Different dimensions.>>
contradictions_detected.resolution: <<Agent 4 notes trade-off in final review. No escalation needed.>>

next_agent: <<Agent 2 — Technical Assessment | Agent 3 — Risk & Economic Assessment | Agent 4 — PM Review | none>>
